ksa_text: Evaluate AI application performance against defined quality, safety, and reliability criteria, documenting test results and identified failure modes.

dcwf.top_element_label: Identify and submit exemplary AI use cases, best practices, failure modes, and risk mitigation strategies, including after-action reports.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of automated security control testing tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.

top_anchors.element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.
Identify and submit exemplary AI use cases, best practices, failure modes, and risk mitigation strategies, including after-action reports.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-007 (AI and Machine Learning/Task) scores 0.536 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.536) and is edge_case for the Data Product Manager role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Data Product Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, NIST AI RMF signal (0.536), and AI and Machine Learning handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support AI/ML competencies for Data Product Manager at manager level?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI/ML overlap appears in 15-40% of Data Product Manager postings depending on seniority. Core signals: 0. OOS signals: 0.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. AI/ML content without sufficient core signals is not market-supported for Data Product Manager. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Revised to exclude. AI/ML content without sufficient core signals is not market-supported for Data Product Manager. Final decision: exclude.
